questions.question: 1 (a) The electronic structures of five atoms, A, B, C, D and E, are shown. ABCDE Answer the following questions about these electronic structures. Each electronic structure may be used once, more than once or not at all. State which electronic structure, A, B, C, D or E, represents: (i) an atom in Group V of the Periodic Table ....................................................

questions.question: 2 (a) Biogas is a mixture of gases produced when agricultural waste is broken down in the absence of oxygen. The table compares the percentage by mass of the gases present in two samples of biogas, X and Y. gas biogas X / % by mass biogas Y / % by mass carbon dioxide2632 hydrogen11 hydrogen sulfide0.50.5 methane6756 nitrogen49.5 oxygen0.50.5 other gases0.5 Answer t
